name: blcaptain-meta-skill
satisfied_promotion_evidence: Execution-level fork_context=false subagent forward-test created a child skill package and passed validation
Regression history records the context_budget.py real-tokenizer RED/GREEN change with rerun evidence
Codex/OpenAI schema was checked with the local skill-creator quick_validate command
OpenAI tiktoken o200k_base context measurement is recorded for SKILL.md
remaining_promotion_requirements: End-to-end visual generation with real user-authorized article, avatar, and product screenshot assets
OCR overflow and face/screenshot obstruction checks for rendered visual outputs
Claude Count Tokens API response for the release-target Claude model
Real multi-skill routing telemetry beyond local fixture evals
Human release approval recorded as promotion_evidence
validation_limitations: Current route evals are fixture/schema checks, not platform routing telemetry
Current execution-level forward-test covers child skill package creation and validation, not real customer-authorized end-to-end image generation
context_budget.py defaults to a heuristic for offline use; OpenAI tiktoken is supported and Claude token counting still requires an authenticated API call
validation_commands: uv run --with tiktoken python blcaptain-meta-skill/scripts/context_budget.py blcaptain-meta-skill/SKILL.md --tokenizer openai --encoding o200k_base
